title: Upon Julia's Riband.
content:
As shows the air when with a rainbow grac'd,
    So smiles that riband 'bout my Julia's waist:
    Or like - nay 'tis that zonulet of love,
    Wherein all pleasures of the world are wove.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Upon Julia's Riband.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
